name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Spectrum Ultra-Premium Kitten Food - Starter32 0.4kg
description: Spectrum Kitten Starter32 , a specially formulated complete and balanced ultra-premium food to meet the nutritional requirements of kittens (4 to 16 weeks of age) and queens during gestation and lactation. OPTIMUM KITTEN GROWTH: Kitten Starter32 with its highly digestible protein sources and unique palatability helps your kitten to adapt to its food easily and ensure optimum growth. OPTIMUM POSTPARTUM NUTRITION OF MOTHER CAT: Kitten Starter32 formula is designed to meet the increased nutritional requirements of your mother cat due to lactation in the?postpartum period. HIGH DIGESTIBILITY: Kitten Starter32 contains highly digestible feedstuffs which are digested well by kitten and mother and optimise the immune system with the SQF concept. OPTIMUM KIBBLE FEATURES: Kitten Starter32 with its proper size ensures adaptation of your kitten to dry food for optimum water/milk absorption.   SYNOX 3D: a blend of natural, standardised GMO free - titrated plant extracts (Rosemary, grape seed, curcuma, citrus and cloves) clinically proven in cats to counter free radicals induced by oxidative cell damage . Free radicals are essential for life. However, ageing is linked to an increased production of free radicals and a decreased ability to counter their negative effects on health and wellbeing. SYNOX 3D limits the production of malondialdehyde, one of the main toxic metabolites of oxidative stress, protecting cell membrane, mitochondria and genetic material of each individual cell. The unique composition of SYNOX 3D is the result of a screening process on 134 plant extracts, combined with trials in laboratory conditions and a successful clinical trial run in pets. Potential health benefits include increased resistance against oxidative stress, improved life-span and immune stimulation. Qrill: Antarctic qrill is a breakthrough ingredient providing a bioavailable matrix of proteins, omega-3 phospholipids and astaxanthin. Qrill or Euphausia superba phospholipids have been clinically proven to promote brain development, skin health, active joints and body composition. Fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS): stimulate growth and metabolism of beneficial bacteria for the intestine of cats. Ingredients: Dehydrated chicken protein, chicken fat, rice, maize, whey powder, hydrolysed bagasse fibre, dried antarctic qrill (euphausia superba), hydrolysed chicken liver, brewer's yeast, whole egg powder, yucca schidigera, L-carnitine, fructo-oligosaccharides (300ppm), rosmarinus sp. - curcuma sp. - vitis sp. - citrus sp.- eugenia sp. (300ppm). Additives: Vitamin A (E-672): 18000 IU/kg, Vitamin D3 (E-671): 1500 IU/kg, Vitamin E (3A700): 200 mg/kg, Vitamin C (E301): 200 mg/kg, Taurin: 1500 mg, Iron (E1): 320 mg/kg, Iodine (E2): 1.5 mg/kg, Copper (E4): 45 mg/kg, Manganese (E5): 20 mg/kg, Zinc (E6): 180 mg/kg, Selenium (E8): 0.9 mg/kg, Preservatives - Antioxidants. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ......................32% Fat ................................. 22% Cellulose (Fiber) ...................2%
